pokemon:sneasler.name: Sneasler
pokemon:sneasler.summary: Because of Sneasler's virulent poison and daunting physical prowess, no other species could hope to best it on the frozen highlands. Preferring solitude, this species does not form packs.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.
